ddls:
CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme (e.g., Adolescent nutrition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the theme was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the theme was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the theme (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator responsible for the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_themes_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion thread */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme the discussion belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discussion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the discussion was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the discussion was closed or the last activity date */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the discussion */,
  "last_reply_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reply in the discussion */,
  "last_reply_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the last reply */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the discussion is pinned (highlighted) */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the discussion */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* Total number of replies for the discussion */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the discussion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_last_reply_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_reply_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric entry */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion thread */,
  "extraction_date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were extracted */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Total number of replies in the discussion */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Total number of views of the discussion */,
  "new_replies" INTEGER /* Number of new replies since the last extraction */,
  "new_views" INTEGER /* Number of new views since the last extraction */,
  "nPosts" INTEGER /* Total number of posts in the discussion */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors to the discussion */,
  "average_time_spent" INTEGER /* Average time spent on the discussion page */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A calculated score based on various engagement metrics */,
  "most_active_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most active user in the discussion */,
  "most_active_user_engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement level of the most active user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_most_active_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("most_active_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., moderator, administrator, member) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio or description of the user */,
  "karma_score" INTEGER /* A score representing the user's reputation or contribution level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion thread the post belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "is_reply" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the post is a reply to another post */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date the post was last edited */,
  "edited_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the post */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the post has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the post has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post has been flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason the post was flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_edited_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
